description: myuzeTV Gap Closure - Fix video player, redesign detail page, wire backend features, add table-stakes features with comprehensive tests

userStories.title: Backend: Create continue-watching API endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a backend endpoint that returns dramas the user is currently watching, sorted by last watched time.
acceptanceCriteria: Create WatchProgressController with continueWatching() method at GET /api/continue-watching
Query WatchProgress where is_completed=false, ordered by last_watched_at DESC, limit 20
Eager load drama and episode relationships to avoid N+1
Return drama info + current episode number + progress_seconds
Requires auth:sanctum middleware
Register route in routes/api.php
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Backend: Create drama search API endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a search endpoint that supports full-text search and genre filtering.
acceptanceCriteria: Add search() method to DramaController at GET /api/dramas/search
Accept query params: q (search term), genre (genre enum value)
Full-text search on title and description fields using MySQL LIKE or FULLTEXT
Genre filter matches drama.genre enum column
Returns paginated results (20 per page) using DramaResource
Empty q with genre set returns all dramas in that genre
Register route in routes/api.php (public, no auth required)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Backend: Create delete account endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an account deletion endpoint for App Store / Play Store compliance.
acceptanceCriteria: Add deleteAccount() method to AuthController at DELETE /api/auth/account
Deletes user's watchlist, watch_progress, likes, and subscriptions
Revokes all Sanctum tokens for the user
Soft-deletes or hard-deletes the user record
Returns 200 with success message
Requires auth:sanctum middleware
Register route in routes/api.php
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Backend: Enhance UserResource with computed stats
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the GET /auth/me response to include user activity stats.
acceptanceCriteria: UserResource includes watchlist_count: count of user's watchlist entries
UserResource includes completed_dramas_count: count of dramas where all episodes completed
UserResource includes total_watch_seconds: sum of progress_seconds from watch_progress
Stats computed via Eloquent relationships (withCount or subqueries)
Existing UserResource fields unchanged
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Frontend API: Add watch progress and continue-watching functions
userStories.description: As a developer, I need frontend API functions to save progress and fetch continue-watching data.
acceptanceCriteria: Add saveProgress(episodeId, progressSeconds, isCompleted) function to api/dramas.js
saveProgress calls POST /episodes/{id}/progress with { progress_seconds, is_completed }
Add fetchContinueWatching() function that calls GET /continue-watching
Both functions use the existing authenticated axios client
saveProgress is fire-and-forget (no error thrown to caller)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Frontend API: Add search, subscription, and account deletion functions
userStories.description: As a developer, I need API functions for search, subscription plans, and account deletion.
acceptanceCriteria: Add searchDramas(query, genre) function calling GET /dramas/search?q=&genre=
Add fetchSubscriptionPlans(platform) function calling GET /subscription/plans
Add checkSubscriptionStatus() function calling GET /subscription/status
Add deleteAccount() function calling DELETE /auth/account
Create new file api/subscription.js for subscription functions
Create new file api/account.js for account deletion function
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Frontend API: Add like drama toggle function
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a frontend function to toggle likes via the backend API.
acceptanceCriteria: Add likeDrama(dramaId) function to api/dramas.js
Calls POST /dramas/{id}/like
Returns updated like count and liked status
Uses authenticated axios client
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Frontend API: Add fetchDramaDetail function for real backend data
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a function that fetches drama detail from GET /dramas/{slug} instead of using mock data.
acceptanceCriteria: Add fetchDramaDetail(slug) function to api/dramas.js
Calls GET /dramas/{slug} endpoint
Maps response to DramaDetail interface: title, banner (banner_url), genre, total_episodes, free_episodes, rating, year (from release_date), country, description, episodes array
Episodes sorted by episode_number ascending
Episode status derived: number <= free_episodes ? 'free' : 'locked' (check subscription)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create reusable SkeletonBox component with shimmer animation
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see content-shaped shimmer placeholders while screens load.
acceptanceCriteria: Create components/SkeletonBox.tsx with configurable width, height, borderRadius props
Shimmer animation: light gradient sweeps left-to-right on 1.5s loop
Uses react-native-reanimated for native-driver animation (60fps)
Base color: dark gray (matches bg-background), shimmer: slightly lighter
Exported as default component
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create SkeletonRail and SkeletonHero compound skeleton components
userStories.description: As a developer, I need pre-built skeleton layouts that mimic DramaRail and HeroUnit.
acceptanceCriteria: Create components/SkeletonRail.tsx mimicking DramaRail: title bar + 5 horizontal card placeholders
Create components/SkeletonHero.tsx mimicking HeroUnit: full-width banner + text placeholders
Both use SkeletonBox internally
SkeletonRail cards match DramaRail card dimensions
SkeletonHero matches hero carousel height
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create GenreChips filter component
userStories.description: As a user, I want tappable genre chips to filter content on home and search screens.
acceptanceCriteria: Create components/GenreChips.tsx with horizontal scrollable chip bar
Chips: 'All', 'Romance', 'Thriller', 'Fantasy', 'Comedy', 'Family Drama'
Active chip: bg-primary text-white, inactive: bg-white/10 text-muted-foreground
Props: selectedGenre, onSelect callback
'All' selected by default
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create StarRating display component
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see visual star ratings showing filled/half/empty stars.
acceptanceCriteria: Create components/StarRating.tsx with props: rating (number 0-5), reviewCount (string)
Renders 5 star icons: filled (primary color), half-filled, empty (muted color)
Half-star supported (e.g., 4.5 shows 4 filled + 1 half + 0 empty)
Numeric rating shown next to stars (e.g., '4.5')
Review count in parentheses (e.g., '(5.1K reviews)')
Uses lucide-react-native Star icon
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Fix video player swipe gesture detection
userStories.description: As a user, I want swipe up/down to reliably change episodes without being confused with taps.
acceptanceCriteria: PanResponder checks BOTH displacement (dy > threshold) AND velocity (vy > 0.3) for swipe
Swipe threshold scales with screen: Math.max(50, screenHeight * 0.05)
Diagonal swipes where |dx| > |dy| * 0.5 are rejected
Movements between 15-50px that aren't fast enough do NOT toggle controls
isSwiping flag uses useRef instead of closure variable
onPanResponderTerminate handler cancels pending swipe
Rapid consecutive swipes debounced (300ms)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Fix video screen fitting and aspect ratio
userStories.description: As a user, I want the video to display correctly without cropping on any screen size.
acceptanceCriteria: Video uses ResizeMode.CONTAIN instead of COVER
Video container fills entire screen with flex: 1
Aspect ratio read from onLoad event (naturalSize.width / naturalSize.height)
Black letterbox shown if aspect ratio doesn't match screen
Works on iPhone SE (375px), iPhone 15 Pro Max (430px), iPad, web
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add episode transition loading state and prevent race conditions
userStories.description: As a user, I want a loading indicator during episode transitions with no stale stream loading.
acceptanceCriteria: Spinner overlay appears within 100ms of swipe completion
Spinner disappears when new video starts playing
If load takes > 5s, show 'Slow connection' message below spinner
Each episode load has a unique request ID (incrementing counter)
When new load starts, previous load cancelled (query cancellation or abort)
Loaded stream always matches current currentEpNumber state
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Disable gestures over control buttons and add controls fade animation
userStories.description: As a user, I want control buttons to work reliably and controls to fade smoothly.
acceptanceCriteria: When controls are visible, PanResponder gesture layer is disabled
Tapping Like/Share/Episodes buttons works without triggering swipe
Swiping only active when controls are hidden
Controls fade in over 200ms when shown (Animated.timing opacity 0→1)
Controls fade out over 300ms when hidden (opacity 1→0)
Uses react-native-reanimated or React Native Animated
Fade animation doesn't block touch events
Controls auto-hide timer (3.5s) still works normally
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add skip intro button to video player
userStories.description: As a user, I want to skip episode intros to get straight to the content.
acceptanceCriteria: Skip Intro button appears in bottom-right after 2 seconds of playback
Button auto-hides after 10 seconds of playback
Tapping button seeks to 10-second mark (skip point)
Button has semi-transparent dark bg for visibility (bg-black/70 rounded-lg px-4 py-2)
Button does NOT appear for episodes shorter than 30 seconds
Button text: 'Skip Intro' with forward arrow icon
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add boundary feedback and fix episode ID parsing
userStories.description: As a user, I want clear feedback at first/last episodes and robust ID parsing.
acceptanceCriteria: Swiping up on last episode shows centered toast: 'You've reached the last episode'
Swiping down on first episode shows toast: 'This is the first episode'
Toast fades in, stays 2s, fades out
No episode transition attempted on boundary swipes
Episode ID parsing handles 'drama-slug-123' format (slug + episode number)
Episode ID parsing handles '123' plain format
Invalid episode ID formats show error screen with back button instead of silently defaulting
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Wire video player like button to backend API
userStories.description: As a user, I want my episode likes to persist via the backend.
acceptanceCriteria: Like button calls likeDrama(dramaId) API function on tap
Initial liked state loaded from drama data when episode loads
Like count updates optimistically (increment/decrement immediately)
Like state persists across episode changes within same drama
Error on API call shows subtle error indicator, not a crash
Guest users prompted to login on like attempt
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add web mouse wheel support for episode navigation
userStories.description: As a web user, I want mouse scroll wheel to navigate between episodes.
acceptanceCriteria: Scroll wheel down = next episode (matches swipe up direction)
Scroll wheel up = previous episode
Wheel events debounced at 500ms to prevent rapid firing
Only active on web platform (Platform.OS === 'web')
Does not interfere with episode drawer scrolling when drawer is open
useEffect with wheel event listener, cleaned up on unmount
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Track watch progress during playback
userStories.description: As a user, I want my watch progress saved so I can resume where I left off.
acceptanceCriteria: saveProgress() called at 25%, 50%, 75%, and 100% playback milestones
100% milestone sets is_completed: true
Progress calls are fire-and-forget (no await, no error thrown)
Only sends progress if user is authenticated (not guest)
Debounced: won't re-send same milestone within 5 seconds
Uses saveProgress function from api/dramas.js (US-005)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Replace drama detail mock data with real API calls
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the detail page to use real backend data instead of mocks.
acceptanceCriteria: Detail page calls fetchDramaDetail(slug) from api/dramas.js (US-008)
React Query cache key: ['drama', slug]
All fields mapped: title, banner_url→banner, genre, total_episodes, free_episodes, rating, release_date→year, country, description, episodes
Episode status derived from: number <= free_episodes ? 'free' : 'locked'
Delete lib/drama-detail-data.ts mock file
Remove getDramaDetail import from app/drama/[slug].tsx
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Make detail page hero responsive and remove duplicate description
userStories.description: As a user, I want the hero banner to look good on any screen and description shown only once.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero height: Math.min(Math.max(screenHeight * 0.55, 300), 500) pixels
Uses Dimensions.get('window').height for calculation
4-stop gradient: from-black/30 via-black/10 via-transparent to-background
Description removed from title/meta area above CTA
Description appears only in 'About' section with 3-line truncation
'Read more' expands, 'Show less' collapses description
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Show all genres as chips and add visual star rating to detail page
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see all drama genres and a visual star rating on the detail page.
acceptanceCriteria: All genres from drama.genre displayed as chips using GenreChips-style styling
If genre is string, split by comma; if array, show all
Chips use bg-primary/20 border-primary/30, text 11px uppercase tracking-wide
Chips flex-wrap to multiple rows if needed
Star rating uses StarRating component (US-012) below genre chips
Rating, review count, year, country shown on meta line with dot separators

userStories.title: Remove hero play button and improve CTA text
userStories.description: As a designer, I want a single clear CTA to start watching.
acceptanceCriteria: Large play button removed from hero center
'Start Watching' CTA button kept below action bar as single CTA
CTA shows 'Start Watching - Episode 1 Free' if drama has free episodes
CTA shows 'Continue Watching - Episode N' if user has watch progress
CTA shows 'Subscribe to Watch' if no free episodes and not subscribed
CTA button styling: h-16, bg-primary, rounded-xl, full width minus padding

userStories.title: Show all episodes in virtualized grid and add skeleton loading
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see all episodes without '+N more' and see skeleton loading while data loads.
acceptanceCriteria: All episodes displayed in 2-column grid (3-column on screens >768px width)
Uses FlashList with estimatedItemSize: 200 for virtualization
Episode cards: thumbnail (3:4 aspect), episode number, duration, lock/free/watched status
Free episodes: 'FREE' badge (top-left, rose-500)
Locked episodes: dimmed image + lock icon + 'Premium' label
Watched episodes: check badge (top-right)
'+N more' card completely removed
Skeleton loading state shows shimmer grid matching episode layout

userStories.title: Improve 'More Like This' section and wire like button on detail page
userStories.description: As a user, I want genre-matched recommendations and persistent likes on the detail page.

Falls back to all dramas if fewer than 3 genre-matched results
Maximum 10 dramas shown

userStories.title: Add subscription status to AuthContext
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the auth context to track subscription status for gating features.
acceptanceCriteria: AuthContext stores isSubscribed: boolean and subscriptionExpiresAt: string | null
On login/auth restore, parse subscription_status and subscription_expires_at from user data
isSubscribed = subscription_status === 'active' AND expires_at > now
Episode lock/unlock in DramaDetailScreen uses real isSubscribed (not hardcoded)
Subscription status re-checked when app returns to foreground (AppState listener)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add Continue Watching rail to home screen

userStories.title: Fix profile screen: remove edit, wire stats, wire delete, show real version

userStories.title: Unit tests: Video player gesture and transition logic

Test: swipe down with sufficient velocity triggers previous episode

Test: insufficient displacement does not change episode
